purpose: Transparent decorative Stone Quarry art for the Stone Quarry inspection card

projectAuthorization.scope: Warpkeep draft PR #65 preparation and use of the background-cleaned derivative in the public Warpkeep GitHub repository, plus an eventual official warpkeep.com Pages runtime only after separately approved deployment. This is use authorization only, not deployment approval.
notGranted: general third-party derivative or redistribution permission
Stone-site placement, renderer, server, browser-derived balance, gathering, reward, or entitlement authority

generation.service: OpenAI image generation edit (built-in Codex imagegen)
generation.prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: high-resolution in-game Stone Quarry inspection-panel artwork
Input images: Image 1 is the edit target and visual reference; preserve its subject identity and overall composition.
Primary request: Create a crisp, polished, high-detail square Stone Quarry cutout for a fantasy strategy-game inspection panel. Preserve the supplied quarry scene: stacked pale stone blocks, timber quarry hoist, small mine cart, workbench, teal sign, scattered stones, grass-and-dirt base, and warm low-poly 3D game-material style. Improve edge quality and material detail while keeping the same readable 3/4 isometric composition and no extra objects.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for later alpha extraction. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, floor plane, reflection, vignette, or lighting variation.
Composition/framing: centered subject, full quarry and ground base visible, generous even transparent-safe padding on every side, no cropping.
Lighting/mood: soft studio daylight, pale stone, warm timber, clean readable silhouette.
Constraints: do not add people, buildings, text, logos, badges, watermark, UI frame, or new game symbols. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the quarry itself. Keep the quarry fully separated from the background with crisp antialiased edges and no cast/contact shadow.

runtimeAsset.delivery: same-origin checked-in runtime asset; no external CDN

presentationBoundary.currentRealmMount: mounted by RealmMapScreen after canonical public Stone-site validation
presentationBoundary.currentNodePlacement: server-governed public Stone site; browser UI does not seed or relocate it

licence.policy: The exact project instruction authorizes this Warpkeep runtime use but does not establish a public relicensing grant. See ASSETS-LICENSE.md.
